description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem FACTS devices. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, rarray = afactsreal(sid, ties, flag, fcttyp, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rarray = afactsreal(sid, ties, flag, fcttyp, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem facts devices with a series element to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem facts devices to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: fcttyp
parameters.description: A flag indicating which types of facts devices to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the FACTS device quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for interior subsystem FACTS devices only.
for subsystem tie FACTS devices only.
for both interior subsystem FACTS devices and tie FACTS devices.

flag.description: for both in-service and out-of-service FACTS devices.

fcttyp.description: for only FACTS devices without a series element.
for only FACTS devices with a series element.
for both types of FACTS devices.

string.description: Voltage setpoint at the sending end bus in pu.
Minimum voltage at the terminal end bus in pu.
Maximum voltage at the terminal end bus in pu.
Maximum series voltage magnitude in pu.
Reactance of the dummy series element.
Percentage of the total MVAR required to regulate the controlled bus voltage that are contributed by this device.
Series voltage magnitude in pu.
Current flow into series element at sending end bus in pu. ‘IPUTRM’ Current flow into series element at terminal end bus in pu.
Current flow into shunt element in pu.
Current flow into series element at sending end bus in amps.
Current flow into series element at terminal end bus in amps.
Current flow into shunt element in amps.
Percent series current loading at sending bus end.
Percent series current loading at terminal bus end.
Percent shunt current loading.
Percent bridge active power loading.
Desired active power flow at the terminal bus end, in MW.
Desired reactive power flow at the terminal bus end, in Mvar.
Maximum shunt current at the sending end bus at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVA.
Maximum bridge active power transfer, in MVA.
Maximum series current at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVA.
Active power flow into the series element at the sending end bus, in MW.
Reactive power flow into the series element at the sending end bus, in Mvar.
Active power flow into the series element at the terminal end bus, in MW.
Reactive power flow into the series element at the terminal end bus, in Mvar.
Bridge active power exchange, in MW.
Reactive power flow into the shunt element, in Mvar.
Power flow into the series element at the sending end bus, in MVA.
Power flow into the series element at the terminal end bus, in MVA.
Power flow into the shunt element, in MVA.
Reactive power losses, in Mvar.
Desired active power flow at the terminal bus end (units determined by power output options).
Desired reactive power flow at the terminal bus end (units determined by power output options).
Maximum shunt current at the sending end bus at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).
Maximum bridge active power transfer (units determined by power output options).
Maximum series current at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).
Active power flow into the series element at the sending end bus (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power flow into the series element at the sending end bus (units determined by power output options).
Active power flow into the series element at the terminal end bus (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power flow into the series element at the terminal end bus (units determined by power output options).
Bridge active power exchange (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power flow into the shunt element (units determined by power output options).
Power flow into the series element at the sending end bus (units determined by power output options).
Power flow into the series element at the terminal end bus (units determined by power output options).
Power flow into the shunt element (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power losses (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
